notableEvents.label: Tyler Stephenson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Stephenson grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Blake Dunn out at 2nd. Tyler Stephenson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Stephenson rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Stephenson grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Blake Dunn out at 2nd. Tyler Stephenson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: TJ Friedl pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: TJ Friedl grounds out to first baseman Alec Burleson.

notableEvents.label: Iván Herrera GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Iván Herrera grounds into a double play, pitcher Chris Paddack to catcher Tyler Stephenson to first baseman Nathaniel Lowe. Bryan Torres out at home. Iván Herrera out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Iván Herrera rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Iván Herrera grounds into a double play, pitcher Chris Paddack to catcher Tyler Stephenson to first baseman Nathaniel Lowe. Bryan Torres out at home. Iván Herrera out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Victor Scott II steals (7) 2nd base. Victor Scott II to 3rd. Victor Scott II advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Tyler Stephenson.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Stephenson challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Iván Herrera steals (2) 2nd base.
